[[File:Snail Mech.png|Frameless|400px|right]]

== Snail Mech ==
The birth of the new silicon-based life is significant. It was reset once due to its bad temper.

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Snail Mech, reach step 2 of [[Mecha Form|Mecha Ritual VII]]. This requires {{RewardIconWithLink|Silicon Life Prototype|green}} from Steel Hall of the [[Rebel Device#Steel Hall|Rebel Cabin]] of the [[Rocket]].

As Snail Mech's quest is quite long, the simplified costs and rewards of it are as follows:
{| class="wikitable"
! Costs !! Rewards
|-
|
* W-Tads 5k
* Mecha Cells 5k
* Refine Speedup 36h
* [[Wormhole|Demon God Chip]] 5
* {{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T1|green}} +10
* {{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T2|blue}} +2
|
* W-Tads +3,040
* Blue Coating +20
* <span style="color:var(--yellow-text)">Soul of Bestie</span> (2h) +3
* <span style="color:var(--red-text)">Soul of Rich Kid</span> (2h) +3
|}

<tabber>
|-|☆ > ★=
After 3 letters back and forth, Snail Mech will ask for 5k Mecha Cells to form a body.
|-|★ > 2★s=
After 3 letters, Snail Mech will ask for 12h of Refine Speedup to evolve faster. This rewards +10 W-Tads.
|-|2★s > 3★s=
After 3 letters, Snail Mech will ask for 5 [[Wormhole|Demon God Chips]] to upgrade their configuration. This rewards W-tads +10.
|-|3★s > 4★s=
After 4 letters, Snail Mech will ask for 10 {{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T1|green}}.
|-|4★s > 5★s=
After 3 letters, Snail Mech will ask for 2 {{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T2|blue}}. This rewards +10 W-Tads.
|-|5★s > 6★s=
After 3 letters, Snail Mech will ask for 24h of Refine Speedup.
|-|6★s > 7★s=
After 55 letters, Snail Mech will ask for 2k W-Tads to travel around the world. This rewards 10 [[Consumables#Food|Dorayaki]].
|-|7★s > 8★s=
After x letters, Snail Mech will ask for 1k more W-Tads.
|-|8★s > 9★s=
After x letters, Snail Mech will ask for 2k more W-Tads to sign up for membership discounts. This rewards +10 W-Tads.
|-|9★s > ★=
After x letters, Snail Mech will return with two fights.

{|class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Weakness!!Special Stats!!Rewards
|-
|Snail Mech and Besties||156,557||149,500||2,499,925||TECH 23,940||HIT +80<br>Paralysis RES +80%||<span style="color:var(--yellow-text)">Soul of Bestie</span> (2h) +3<br>Blue Coating +20
|-
|Snail Mech & Tech bros||173,417||165,600||3,010,609||TECH 25,260||HIT +80<br>Paralysis RES +80%||<span style="color:var(--red-text)">Soul of Rich Kid</span> (2h) +3<br>W-Tads +3k
|}
|-|★ > 72★s=
After winning the two fights, Snail Mech will be reset and her Friendship will be set to max (72 Hearts). She will then move in with her minion, [[#Minion|Snail Mech]].
</tabber>

== Rent ==
[[File:Snail Mech Rent.png|left|300px]]

Snail Mech's rent is collected on '''Tuesday''', and can be found as a small rounded object on the left side of her room. 

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T1|green}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T2|blue}} {{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T3|purple}}

 '''1-time Rent''': ??

{{Clear}}

== Relics ==
Upgrading these will earn Refine Speedup!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|Refine Speedup +1h
|-
|★★
|Refine Speedup +1h
|-
|★★★
|Refine Speedup +1h
|-
|★★★★
|Refine Speedup +2h
|-
|★★★★★
|Refine Speedup +3h
|-
|★★★★★★
|Refine Speedup +4h
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Quantum Cat}}{{Relink|Quantum Cat}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Flyer I}}{{Relink|Flyer I}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Edison's Phonograph}}{{Relink|Edison's Phonograph}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Otto Engine}}{{Relink|Otto Engine}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Babbage Engine}}{{Relink|Babbage Engine}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Nuclear Bomb}}{{Relink|Nuclear Bomb}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Sputnik 1}}{{Relink|Sputnik 1}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Edison's Kinetoscope}}{{Relink|Edison's Kinetoscope}}
|}

== Snail Mech's Processor ==
For a silicon-based life, the processor is their life. It is highly connected to the integrity of their consciousness and their intelligence level.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||TECH +5||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -1m
|-
|2||180||2k||TECH +10||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -2m
|-
|3||190||4.5k||TECH +15||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -3m
|-
|4||200||8k||TECH +20||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -4m
|-
|5||210||12.5k||TECH +25||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -5m
|-
|6||220||18k||TECH +30||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -6m
|-
|7||230||24.5k||TECH +35||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -7m
|-
|8||240||32k||TECH +40||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -8m
|-
|9||250||40.5k||TECH +45||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -9m
|-
|10||260||50k||TECH +50||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -10m
|-
|11||270||60.5k||TECH +55||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -11m
|-
|12||285||72k||TECH +60||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -12m
|-
|13||300||84.5k||TECH +65||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -13m
|-
|14||315||98k||TECH +70||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -14m
|-
|15||330||112k||TECH +75||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -15m
|-
|16||345||123k||TECH +80||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -16m
|-
|17||360||144k||TECH +85||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -17m
|-
|18||375||162k||TECH +90||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -18m
|-
|19||390||180k||TECH +95||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -19m
|-
|20||400||200k||TECH +100||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -20m
|-
|21||420||220k||TECH +105||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -21m
|-
|22||440||242k||TECH +110||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -22m
|-
|23||460||264k||TECH +115||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -23m
|-
|24||480||285k||TECH +120||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -24m
|-
|25||500||309k||TECH +125||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -25m
|-
|26||520||333k||TECH +130||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -26m
|-
|27||540||357k||TECH +135||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -27m
|-
|28||560||381k||TECH +140||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -28m
|-
|29||580||405k||TECH +145||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -29m
|-
|30||600||429k||TECH +150||Wormhole Device Refinement Time -30m
|}

==Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Snail Mech's Processor is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +10
|-
|2||4k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +20
|-
|3||6k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +30
|-
|4||8k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +40
|-
|5||10k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +50
|-
|6||12k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +60
|-
|7||14k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +70
|-
|8||16k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +80
|-
|9||18k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +90
|-
|10||20k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +100
|-
|11||22k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +110
|-
|12||24k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +120
|-
|13||26k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +130
|-
|14||28k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +140
|-
|15||30k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +150
|-
|16||32k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +160
|-
|17||34k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +170
|-
|18||36k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +180
|-
|19||38k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +190
|-
|20||40k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +200
|-
|21||42k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +210
|-
|22||44k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +220
|-
|23||46k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +230
|-
|24||48k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +240
|-
|25||50k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +250
|-
|26||55k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +260
|-
|27||60k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +270
|-
|28||65k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +280
|-
|29||70k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +290
|-
|30||75k||Mecha Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop RUSH +300
|}

== Research Ability ==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Snail Mech specializes in '''Mecha Gene''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Mecha is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

== Minion - Snail Mech ==
This is an advanced mechanical life form, and its birth marks the end of the hegemony of carbon-based lifeforms. It appears to be more suitable for the future along the evolution process.

===Special Ability - Self-Destruct===
Per 10 Snail Mechs in battle, Troop Fire DMG +1 (multiplied by minion level)

=== Minion Relics ===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Snail Mechs!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Quantum Cat}}<br>{{relink|Quantum Cat}}
|Snail Mech HP +1%
|Snail Mech DEF +1%
|Snail Mech ATK +1%
|Snail Mech RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Flyer I}}<br>{{relink|Flyer I}}
|Snail Mech HP +1%
|Snail Mech DEF +1%
|Snail Mech ATK +1%
|Snail Mech RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Edison's Phonograph}}<br>{{relink|Edison's Phonograph}}
|Snail Mech HP +2%
|Snail Mech DEF +2%
|Snail Mech ATK +2%
|Snail Mech RUSH +2%
|Snail Mech All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Otto Engine}}<br>{{relink|Otto Engine}}
|Snail Mech HP +2%
|Snail Mech DEF +2%
|Snail Mech ATK +2%
|Snail Mech RUSH +2%
|Snail Mech All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Babbage Engine}}<br>{{relink|Babbage Engine}}
|Snail Mech HP +4%
|Snail Mech HP +4%
|Snail Mech HP +4%
|Snail Mech HP +4%
|Snail Mech HP +4%
|Snail Mech HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Nuclear Bomb}}<br>{{relink|Nuclear Bomb}}
|Snail Mech DEF +4%
|Snail Mech DEF +4%
|Snail Mech DEF +4%
|Snail Mech DEF +4%
|Snail Mech DEF +4%
|Snail Mech DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Sputnik 1}}<br>{{relink|Sputnik 1}}
|Snail Mech ATK +4%
|Snail Mech ATK +4%
|Snail Mech ATK +4%
|Snail Mech ATK +4%
|Snail Mech ATK +4%
|Snail Mech ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Edison's Kinetoscope}}<br>{{relink|Edison's Kinetoscope}}
|Snail Mech RUSH +4%
|Snail Mech RUSH +4%
|Snail Mech RUSH +4%
|Snail Mech RUSH +4%
|Snail Mech RUSH +4%
|Snail Mech RUSH +4%
|-
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
